title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama project: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling programmatic chat, generate, embed, and pull operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration allowing Ollama models to be used as LLMs or chat models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for Ollama supporting chat history, model management, and multi-user auth.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing fluent APIs for chat, generate, and model operations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with prompt history, syntax highlighting, and conversation management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to server channels with slash commands and conversation threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal pod autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-dependent code.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat or generate endpoints inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama with ActiveModel-style interfaces and background job helpers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and both synchronous and async APIs.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component that connects to Ollama and adds file upload, history export, and model switching.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that uses local Ollama models for note summarization, Q&A, and template generation.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-stage Dockerfile and docker-compose examples for CPU and GPU deployments.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU auto-shutdown and S3 model cache.
